params_used.custom_text: // This module is designed to capture a serial input bit (X_in) and store it into an 11-bit wide parallel output (x_par) on the falling edge of the clock (clk) while a shift disable signal (sx) is asserted. The circuit resets to one when the reset signal (rst) is active. It has a counter (shifts) to track the number of bits stored, allowing a maximum of 11 bits before updating the output signal (fx) to indicate that the register is empty.
